patch.summary: Implemented OAuth PKCE callback handler and in-memory session store based on accepted decision.

files_added.description: Handles OAuth authorization code exchange, PKCE verifier lookup, access token retrieval, and basic user info fetch.
Provides in-memory session store, session creation, and Express middleware to attach session to requests.
Wires /auth/callback route to the callback handler and applies session middleware.

decisions.decision: Use an in-memory session store for the initial implementation.
decisions.rationale: Fastest path to validate the OAuth flow end-to-end; durable store can be added later.

latest_handoff.state: OAuth callback handler and session middleware implemented; no provider integration or route guards yet.
latest_handoff.next: Configure OAuth provider credentials and add dashboard route guards.

update.reason: This update is derived from stale context indicating revision 1, task creation accepted, and the next step being to implement the OAuth callback handler and session store. It assumes no newer changes have occurred.
